form.formComment: Returns from a 49-day let-up. Last start sat on the speed throughout before fading 11th of 15 at Ascot in the LR Detonator on February 21 over 1800m, 2.75 len behind Fear The Wind with 56.5kg at $71. The race before that 10th of 12 at Ascot Rtg 66+ on January 24 over 2200m, 5 len behind Amazing Cheat carrying 58kg at $5.50. Been back to the trials since his latest effort and can return to his best.
